---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Explain why this feature would be useful and what problem it solves.

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you would like to happen or how the feature should work.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here.
